The prediction target is "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism," which requires explicit evidence of a lipid disorder (hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, etc.) to predict a future diagnosis, excluding general risk factors like hypertension or cardiovascular disease.

    * Unspecified essential hypertension.
    * Congestive heart failure, unspecified.
    * Atrial fibrillation.
    * Severe sepsis/Septic shock (which can be associated with metabolic derangements).
    * Thyrotoxicosis of other specified origin.
